description: Complete weapon skills database for Grudge Warlords - all weapon types with icons

slot1.name: Quick Jab
slot1.description: Fast jab, lower damage but builds combo

slot3.name: Parry
slot3.description: Block incoming attack and counter for 50% damage

slot4.description: Causes deep wounds that bleed for 5s

slot4.description: Gain attack speed per bleed on enemy

slot5.description: Deal 300% damage to enemies who damaged you recently

slot4.description: Phase through enemy, dealing damage from behind

slot4.description: Mark enemy, next hit from any source crits

slot5.description: Become invisible and your next attack crits for 250%
